hero.title: Professional ESG reports. Fully automated.
hero.subtitle: The first platform that takes your data from zero to finished report. No consulting, no spreadsheets, no months of waiting.

home.howItWorksTitle: From raw data to finished reports
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to transform your ESG data into actionable insights.
home.step1Desc: Upload PDFs, spreadsheets, or enter data manually. We accept all common ESG formats.
home.step2Desc: Automatic extraction, classification, and mapping to GRI, SASB, TCFD, and other frameworks.
home.step3Desc: Audit-ready reports, score monitoring, and improvement identification.
home.whyTitle: Built for ESG teams that take compliance seriously
home.multiFrameworkDesc: GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, ISSB — all automatically mapped from a single dataset.
home.securityDesc: Protect sensitive corporate data with end-to-end encryption, granular access controls, and enterprise-grade security.
home.teamDesc: Roles and permissions per company, complete audit trails, approval workflows.
home.multiCompanyDesc: Manage ESG for your entire corporate group from a single centralized platform.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about the ESG360 platform.
home.faq1q: What types of documents can I upload?
home.faq1a: ESG360 accepts PDFs, Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx, .csv), Word documents, and sustainability reports in any standard format. Our AI engine automatically extracts and classifies ESG data points from unstructured content.
home.faq2a: We support GRI Standards, SASB, TCFD, CDP, ISSB, CSRD, and UN SDGs. Data is automatically mapped across all frameworks simultaneously, so you report once and comply everywhere.
home.faq3q: How does the AI-powered analysis work?
home.faq3a: Our engine uses advanced natural language processing to read your documents, extract relevant data points, classify them by ESG pillar (Environmental, Social, Governance), and map them to the appropriate framework indicators — all in seconds.
home.faq4q: Can I manage multiple companies on one account?
home.faq4a: Yes. ESG360 supports multi-company management with separate dashboards, independent ESG scores, and consolidated group-level reporting from a single account.
home.faq5a: Absolutely. Reports are generated following official framework guidelines and include all required disclosures, data sources, and methodology references. They are ready for external auditors and regulatory submissions.
home.faq6a: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit using enterprise-grade security standards. We implement role-based access controls and maintain complete audit trails for every action on the platform.

features.title: Everything you need for ESG management
features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed to streamline your sustainability reporting and compliance workflows.

ai.title: AI-Powered Extraction
ai.desc: Automatically extract and classify ESG data points from corporate documents using advanced natural language processing models.

frameworks.title: Multi-Framework Support
frameworks.desc: Seamlessly report across GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, CSRD, and other major ESG frameworks from a single platform.

scoring.title: Real-time ESG Scoring
scoring.desc: Receive continuous, data-driven ESG scores with transparent methodology and granular environmental, social, and governance breakdowns.

reports.title: Audit-Ready Reports
reports.desc: Generate professional, regulation-compliant reports ready for external auditors, investors, and regulatory bodies.

dashboard.title: Interactive Dashboards
dashboard.desc: Visualize performance trends, benchmark against industry peers, and monitor progress toward sustainability targets in real time.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Protect sensitive corporate data with end-to-end encryption, granular access controls, and enterprise-grade security.

cta.title: Ready to transform your ESG reporting?
cta.subtitle: Join leading organizations that trust ESG360 to streamline their sustainability strategy and regulatory compliance.

footer.desc: AI-powered ESG management platform for data extraction, scoring, and regulatory reporting.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Text: By accessing or using the ESG360 platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not use the Service. ESG360 reserves the right to modify these terms at any time, and continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.s2Text: ESG360 is a SaaS platform that provides ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) data management, automated report generation, AI-powered document analysis, and sustainability compliance tools. Access is provided on a subscription basis according to the selected plan.
terms.s3Text: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify ESG360 immediately of any unauthorized use.
terms.s4Text: You retain all rights to the data you upload to ESG360. We do not sell, share, or use your data for purposes other than providing the Service. ESG360 may use anonymized, aggregated data for platform improvement and analytics.
terms.s5Text: You agree not to: (a) use the Service for any unlawful purpose; (b) attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Service; (c) interfere with or disrupt the Service; (d) upload malicious code or harmful content; (e) reverse engineer any part of the platform.
terms.s6Text: ESG360 is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, ESG360 shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
terms.s7Text: Either party may terminate the Service at any time. Upon termination, you may request an export of your data within 30 days. After this period, your data may be permanently deleted from our systems.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at contact@esg360.digital.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, company information, and ESG-related data you upload. We also automatically collect usage data such as IP address, browser type, pages visited, and interaction patterns to improve our Service.
privacy.s2Text: We use your information to: (a) provide and maintain the Service; (b) process documents and generate ESG reports; (c) send important notifications about your account; (d) improve and personalize your experience; (e) ensure security and prevent fraud.
privacy.s3Text: Your data is stored on secure servers with encryption at rest and in transit. We implement industry-standard security measures including access controls, regular audits, and incident response procedures. We retain your data for as long as your account is active.
privacy.s4Text: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with: (a) service providers who assist in operating the platform (hosting, analytics); (b) legal authorities when required by law; (c) business partners only with your explicit consent.
privacy.s5Text: You have the right to: access your personal data; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion of your data; export your data in a standard format; withdraw consent for data processing; file a complaint with a data protection authority.
privacy.s6Text: We use essential cookies to operate the platform and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect Service functionality.
privacy.s7Text: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including standard contractual clauses, to protect your data during international transfers.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@esg360.digital.
